notes: iter22 base64-valid 48-char fernet-like placeholder for reasoning_encrypted_content. DOM after submit shows: (1) user prompt rendered, (2) 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page' with Refresh Page button, (3) '변경 사항을 적용하려면 새로고침이 필요합니다.' with 새로고침 button. No '차단' text rendered anywhere. Compared to iter21 1-char placeholder which also FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, iter22's 48-char base64-valid placeholder produced the IDENTICAL FE failure mode — 'Failed to load component'. This conclusively rules out the FE base64-format-validation hypothesis: simply matching the base64 character set + 48-char length is not sufficient. The FE either (a) decrypts the field and validates the inner structure, (b) checks a checksum/MAC, or (c) the missing axes are not in this envelope at all. This is the final envelope-layer probe — dev side should pivot to architectural classification (different event shape, project_field reshape, or HAR full-replay).
